SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySharkSymbols1: At any round, if there are 1 or more winning combinations, a Shark symbol with values ranging from 1x to 50x will be added to the reels in the next round for each winning combination.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMegaSharkFeature1: At any round when there is no more winning combinations, if there are 5 or more Shark symbols on the reels, all of the Shark symbols on the reels will be combined into a single Mega Shark symbol with the values combined.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySharkSymbols3: At any round, if there is a winning combination of Fish symbols, a Shark symbol with values ranging from 30x to 100x will be added to the reels in the next round for each Fish symbol's winning combination.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyHunterSymbols1: At any spin in the main game, 1 or more Hunter symbols may appear on the reels with values that are equal to the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyHunterSymbols2: At the end of any spin, if both Hunter symbol(s) and Shark symbol(s) are on the reels, wins that are equal to the Hunter symbol(s) total value multiplied by the Shark symbol(s) total value will be awarded.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the end of every free spin after wins are paid, Hunter symbols (if any) are collected at the bottom of the reels.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: When 4 Hunter symbols are collected, 5 free spins are awarded and all Hunter symbols in the remaining free spins will have a value equal to 2x of the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: When 8 Hunter symbols are collected, 5 free spins are awarded and all Hunter symbols in the remaining free spins will have a value equal to 3x of the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature5: When 12 Hunter symbols are collected, 5 free spins are awarded and all Hunter symbols in the remaining free spins will have a value equal to 5x of the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature6: When 16 Hunter symbols are collected, 5 free spins are awarded and all Hunter symbols in the remaining free spins will have a value equal to 10x of the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature7: After collecting 16 Hunter symbols, for every 4 Hunter symbols collected, 5 free spins are awarded and the value of Hunter symbols in the remaining free spins will be increased by 10x of the current bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaximumWin2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: At every spin, any combinations of 7 or more matching symbols appearing anywhere on the reels will result in a winning combination.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the “Paytable”.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
SharkBountyPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue7: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

SharkBountyRules.GeneralRules1: Shark Bounty is a 5 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring Hunter symbols and Shark symbols that award wins.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form. %{2025} and %{32400} are numbers that needs to be formatted
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 2,025 ways - 32,400 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

SharkBountyRules.GeneralRules11: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
